_description: Curated demo subset for the zero-API regime-diagnostic demotion eval. redocred_checkpoints = first 100 of 152 Re-DocRED confirmatory checkpoints (raw per-candidate Z/Zt/W + decoy_contaminated). exp3_regime_diagnostic, exp1_primary_disconfirmation_verdict, exp1_multi_hop_rows are the cached summary scalars used for cross-checks and the regime panel.

redocred_checkpoints.title: Baltimore and Ohio Railroad Martinsburg Shops
List of Celtic F.C. records and statistics
List of political parties in Egypt
You've Got to Walk It Like You Talk It or You'll Lose That Beat
Final Fantasy Tactics: The War of the Lions
The Pool of the Black One

exp3_regime_diagnostic.summary: Label-free 2-axis regime-diagnostic that predicts the operational-wedge sign from cached Z/Zt/W/self-consistency with ZERO API calls and NO gold, then validates against the realized wedge.

signal_B_cdf_match.interpretation: MATCH (fail-to-reject) => decoys exchangeable with the model's own spontaneous errors (valid knockoff); REJECT with decoy mean < low-f-real mean => decoys TOO EASY (gate redundant/worse).

signal_C_wz_divergence.interpretation: frac(W==Z)~1 and admitted-set rho~1 => the gate keeps and orders the same facts as the plain Z threshold => mechanically NULL wedge. Jaccard<1 measures the few 'winner' demotions, which the realized wedge shows are precision-neutral here.

signal_D_calibration.interpretation: AUC(Z -> high-self-consistency) high => Z is calibrated against the model's own truth proxy => plain threshold already separates good from bad => the gate is redundant rather than harmful.

exp3_regime_diagnostic.prediction_basis: Signal C (frac(W==Z)=0.9391, admitted-set rho=0.99096: the gate keeps & orders the same facts as the plain threshold -> mechanically null wedge)

prediction_vs_realized.note: prediction_correct == (predicted null) AND (no matched-recall point has a delta CI entirely > 0).

cross_anchor.principle: Gate value is monotone in tail-overconfidence and CONDITIONAL on decoy exchangeability: the decoy-competition gate adds value ONLY where the base elicitation is tail-overconfident AND the decoys are exchangeable with the model's own errors (win-rate ~0.5); it is REDUNDANT where the base scorer is already calibrated / decoys are too easy (win-rate <<0.5, rho~1), and WORSE where decoys are too easy but the scorer is anti-conservative.
cross_anchor.direction: The wedge sign is governed by a 2-AXIS map, NOT a 1-D monotone of winrate_tail: the positive (gate-adds-value) regime requires exchangeable decoys (winrate~0.5) — realized only at the high end (CLUTRR self-consistency, 0.482, positive). At the LOW (too-easy) end the sign SPLITS by base-scorer calibration: Re-DocRED (0.047) is NULL (redundant) because its scorer is comparatively calibrated and frac(W==Z)~0.94 means almost nothing is demoted, whereas CLUTRR verbalized/logprob (0.10/0.34) are NEGATIVE (anti-conservative). So winrate alone does NOT linearly order the sign — the calibration axis is required. Reported as a 4-point 2-anchor illustration, NOT a powered regression.

exp1_primary_disconfirmation_verdict.reason: realized FDR 1.0 > alpha*+tau (0.5+0.05) AND doc-block CI [0.661594,1.0] lies entirely above alpha*=0.5.
